panels.title: Team Roster Cards [CARD]
panels.scene: Montage — six quick stat cards (stacked vertical scroll) — Kwon's roster debut at tournament.

panels.title: Gear Table [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV lays out electronic hogus, headgear, arm/leg guards. Labels each piece.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Chest sensor — two for body. Head sensor — three for head. Gear only scores clean contact."

panels.title: Team Helps Strap [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan can't figure leg strap — Kieryn sighs, fixes it. TJ helps Ariana headgear.

panels.title: Ethan Mirror [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ethan **fully geared** — white dobok + electronic chest hogu + headgear + forearm guards + shin/foot guards — mirror shot. Silver belt hidden under hogu.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Armor on. Still the same kid underneath.*

panels.title: Bracket Mismatch [TEACH]
panels.scene: Bracket board — Ethan's name under heavier division line.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Weight class got bumped. You'll fight up. Happens in opens."

panels.title: Team Pep [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Hands in — Logan too short, stands on tiptoes.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "We corner you. You don't fight alone."

panels.title: Sensor Calibration [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV taps each fighter's chest hogu — LED test blink.
panels.dialogue: MV: "If it doesn't flash on contact, tell me before you bleed for nothing."

panels.title: Ariana & Kian Arms [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Ariana threads Kian's forearm guard strap — he's impatient.
panels.dialogue: Ariana: "Hold still." · Kian: "I'm holding." · Ariana: "You're vibrating."

panels.title: Periphery Test [TEACH]
panels.scene: Logan spins in headgear — walks into wall.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "You can't see your feet. That's the point." · Logan: "I can see the wall."

panels.title: Ethan Sensor Tap [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV light tap to Ethan's hogu — clean flash. Ethan flinches anyway.

panels.title: Kieryn Shadow Trash Talk [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kieryn faces empty ring — mutters at imaginary opponent.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Try me. I dare you." · TJ: "She's been doing that since six AM."

panels.title: Logan Mirror Selfie [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan discovers venue mirror — full gear — peace sign.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Document the armor!" · MV: "Put the phone away."

panels.title: Belt Check [KWONS]
panels.scene: MV walks the line — silver belts under hogus — Logan's crooked.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Belts straight. You represent the school before you throw a kick."

panels.title: Bracket Close-Up [TEACH]
panels.scene: Board extreme close — **Derek Cole · Apex TKD · Open −54 kg**.

panels.title: Weight Line [TEACH]
panels.scene: Diagram inset — Ethan's division bumped above his weigh-in class.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Opens merge light juniors with heavy cadets sometimes. You still score the same."

panels.title: Team Photo Attempt [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Ariana holds phone — Logan blinks — Kian photobombs.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Again." · Logan: "I wasn't ready!" · Kieryn: "You never are."

panels.title: Kian Nervous Shadow [ACTION]
panels.scene: Kian shadowboxes in corner — fast feet — can't sit still.

panels.title: TJ Emperor Stance [TEACH]
panels.scene: TJ alone — wide base — slow chamber — team watches without interrupting.

panels.title: Ariana Bandages [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ariana wraps wrist under forearm guard — methodical — MV nods once.

panels.title: Walk to Registration [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Wide — full team in gear bags — arena hallway — first tournament scale.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "This hallway is bigger than our whole dojang." · TJ: "Good."

panels.title: Weigh-In Chaos
panels.scene: Scale line — Kieryn trash talk at rival cadet.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Don't breathe out. You'll miss weight and cry."

panels.title: Logan Waves [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan waves at every school banner like parade.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Hi! We came to win! Or try!"

panels.title: Venue Scale [TEACH]
panels.scene: Wide — multiple rings, electronic scoreboards overhead.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Ring four is ours. Watch the board — it tells you what's real."

panels.title: No Knockout Bounty [REAL #28 contrast]
panels.scene: MV team huddle — safety briefing before matches.
panels.dialogue: MV: "We win on **points**. We win on **control**. We do **not** chase knockouts. Black belt means **discipline**, not cruelty." · Logan: *(whisper)* "Was that… a thing somewhere?" · Ethan: "Thousand won. If you knock them out. He said I was **too nice** to be one." · Kieryn: "That's not taekwondo. That's a lawsuit." · MV: "Head kicks are three points — not invitations to hurt someone for show."

panels.title: Registration Line [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Long desk queue — Kieryn fills forms for half the team.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Spell your legal name. Not your gamertag." · Kian: "…Fine."

panels.title: Banner Hall [TEACH]
panels.scene: Wide pan — dozens of school banners — regional colors.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Every banner is someone who thinks they're ready. So are we."

panels.title: Premier Banner [PREMIER inset]
panels.scene: **Premier TKD** banner on far wall — Ethan freezes half a step.

panels.title: Kieryn Makes Weight [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Scale — Kieryn steps off — fist pump micro.

panels.title: Logan Scale Comedy [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan on tiptoes on scale — MV deadpan.

panels.title: Coach Credentials [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV lanyard scanned — official wristband — assistant points ring four.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Corner access. I stay where the rules let me."

panels.title: Ring Assignment [TEACH]
panels.scene: Board — **Ring 4 — Kwon's Taekwondo** — match times listed.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Ethan first. Then me. Then chaos."

panels.title: Derek on Schedule [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ethan finds Derek's name on same ring block — earlier slot.

panels.title: PA Announcement [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Overhead speaker — muffled — Logan salutes the ceiling.
panels.dialogue: PA: "Athletes report to holding—" · Logan: "Yes sir."

panels.title: Warmup Zone [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Team stretches — synchronized accidentally — then not.

panels.title: Apex Stare [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Apex TKD athletes pass — Derek doesn't look — teammates do.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Let them look. We came to fight."

panels.title: Scoreboard Colors [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV points at live board — blue/red — point flash demo on loop.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Blue corner. Red corner. Board never lies. Ref might."

panels.title: Kian Fire [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kian cracks neck — grin feral — Logan copies badly.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Three hours in a van. I'm done sitting." · Logan: "Same!"

panels.title: Overpriced Snack [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan holds tiny protein bar — price sticker visible — shock.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "Eight dollars." · Kieryn: "Put it back." · Logan: "…Half."

panels.title: Hall Wide — Chapter End [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Extreme wide — four rings active — Kwon's team small in frame — scale established.

panels.title: MV Last Look [KWONS]
panels.scene: MV watches Ethan walk toward holding — doesn't call him back.

panels.title: Bus / Car Convoy
panels.scene: Team van — Kieryn earbuds, Kian arm wrestle Logan, Ethan window seat headphones.

panels.title: Baseline Banter Callback
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Stop fighting." · Kian: "I was." · Logan: "Can we stop for food?"

panels.title: MV Tap [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: MV taps Ethan's shoulder — Ethan removes headphones one ear.

panels.title: Highway Wide [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Van on highway — tournament flyer taped to window — sun rising.

panels.title: Snack Politics [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: TJ divides chips — Logan gets crumbs — accepts happily.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Fair is fair." · Logan: "Crumbs are still chips."

panels.title: Kieryn Playlist [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kieryn one earbud out — offers other to Ariana — declined — smirk.

panels.title: Kian vs Logan Arm Wrestle [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Arm wrestle on gear bag — Logan surprisingly stubborn — Kian wins slow.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "You're annoying strong for a gremlin." · Logan: "Thanks!"

panels.title: Ethan Window [KWONS]
panels.scene: Ethan forehead on glass — reflection double — headphones on again.

panels.title: MV Rearview [KWONS]
panels.scene: MV eyes in rearview — sees whole team — small smile — says nothing.

panels.title: Rest Stop Sprint [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan races to bathroom — Kian chases — MV doesn't stop them.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Let them burn it off." · Ariana: "Wise."

panels.title: Baseline Callback II [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Van restarted — same argument pattern as Arc 2.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "I wasn't fighting." · TJ: "You were." · Logan: "Food now?"

panels.title: Gear Check Mid-Trip [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV calls roll — gear present — Logan missing one shin guard — panic — found.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "It was under the seat!" · Kieryn: "Under YOUR seat. Shocking."

panels.title: Ariana Nap [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Ariana asleep sitting perfect posture — Logan draws on her hand — caught.

panels.title: TJ Captain Count [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: TJ counts heads before re-entry — six — plus MV — seven.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "All accounted for. Let's go lose our minds properly."

panels.title: Ethan One Ear Off [KWONS]
panels.scene: Ethan removes headphones — both ears — without MV asking this time.

panels.title: Venue First Sight [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Van rounds corner — arena exterior — team goes quiet.

panels.title: Parking Lot Chaos [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Cars everywhere — Logan waves at strangers again — Kieryn pulls him.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "We don't know them." · Logan: "We might after today!"

panels.title: Gear Unload [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Assembly line — bags handed — Logan drops his — TJ catches.

panels.title: Entrance March [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Team walks in formation — accidental — Logan in middle — chin up.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Look like we belong." · Logan: "We do!"

panels.title: Doors Open Wide [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Automatic doors — noise rush — chapter end — Ethan steps through last.

panels.title: Alone in Mirror
panels.scene: **Full kyorugi kit** — Ethan tightens headgear strap — forearm and shin guards visible.

panels.title: Opponent Scout
panels.scene: **Derek Cole** (Apex TKD) — taller — **full competition gear** — warming up spinning hooks.

panels.title: MV Corner Lesson [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV points at opponent's tell — hip drops before spin.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Hook kick — watch the chamber. If he spins, turning kick doubles. Cover high."

panels.title: Walk to Ring [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Team lines path — **Ethan in full kit** — fist bumps. Logan: "Hit him like he owes you ramen!"

panels.title: Bracket Board [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ethan stares at board — **Derek Cole · Apex · 2nd Dan · Open −54**.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Two inches taller on paper. Lies.*

panels.title: Arc 1 Flash Rhyme [PREMIER inset]
panels.scene: One-panel inset — younger Ethan alone — same empty eyes — snap back.

panels.title: Derek Spin Scout [ACTION]
panels.scene: Through crowd gap — Derek **spinning hook** air — hip drop visible — slow-mo inset.

panels.title: Counter Stance Drill [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV adjusts Ethan's guard — low — chin tucked — feet wider.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Counter fighter doesn't chase. You let them gamble."

panels.title: Kieryn Trash Talk Scout [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kieryn watches Derek's corner — lip-reads — smirks.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "His corner said spin early. They're not subtle."

panels.title: Logan Pep Escalation [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan bounces — too much energy — TJ puts hand on his head.
panels.dialogue: Logan: "You got this!" · TJ: "He knows. Breathe."

panels.title: Ariana Quiet [KWONS]
panels.scene: Ariana tapes Ethan's glove strap — no speech — firm pull.

panels.title: Kian Fire Redirect [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kian shadow-kicks beside Ethan — not showing off — syncing rhythm.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "First kick's a lie. Second one's the truth."

panels.title: Holding Call [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: PA — **Hyun, Ethan — Ring 4** — team moves as one.

panels.title: Corridor Walk [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Team flanks Ethan — tunnel of teammates — Blue Lock intensity.
panels.dialogue: Kieryn: "Eyes on his hip. Not his face."

panels.title: Derek Entrance [ACTION]
panels.scene: Derek enters opposite — taller — bounces — doesn't bow at Ethan yet.

panels.title: Ref Gear Check [TEACH]
panels.scene: Ref inspects sensors — taps hogus — both fighters still.

panels.title: MV Corner Set [KWONS]
panels.scene: MV in corner chair — illegal zone line visible — towel ready.

panels.title: Team Behind MV [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Full squad behind coach — silent — Logan mouths "go."

panels.title: Ethan Breath [KWONS]
panels.scene: Extreme close — Ethan's eyes — breath in — out — ring blur behind.

panels.title: Ring Wide — Shi-jak Setup [ACTION]
panels.scene: Wide octagon — both fighters — ref center — crowd hush — chapter end.

panels.title: Fighter VS Cards [CARD] ★
panels.scene: Dual stat card — **Ethan Hyun** (blue) vs **Derek Cole** (red). Empty boxes for post text.

panels.title: Octagon Wide
panels.scene: Olympic-style mat — names on screen — score 0–0 — Round 1.

panels.title: Guard Up
panels.scene: Ref bow. Ethan **counter stance** — low guard — Derek side-on bounce.

panels.title: Probe Cut [ACTION]
panels.scene: Derek **front-leg cut kick** — Ethan blocks high — trunk sensor test.

panels.title: Ethan Step-In [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan **steps into range** — classic mistake vs spin setup.

panels.title: Feint Cut & Chamber [TEACH + ACTION]
panels.scene: Derek **second cut feint** — hip drops — **spinning hook chamber** — slow-mo inset foot path.

panels.title: Impact [TEACH + ACTION] ★
panels.scene: **Spinning hook** to head — PSS headgear **LED flash** — scoreboard **+5**.

panels.title: Ethan Frozen
panels.scene: Ethan stands — guard dropped — ref waves — Ethan doesn't move.

panels.title: Scoreboard
panels.scene: Derek leads **5–0** — round time remaining — psychological KO.

panels.title: MV Corner [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: MV hand on barrier — doesn't yell — team behind silent.

panels.title: Nightmare Inset
panels.scene: Flash — **same kick** Arc 1 Ch 1 nightmare — visual rhyme.

panels.title: Headgear Off
panels.scene: Ethan removes headgear — hands shake — eyes empty.

panels.title: Match Over
panels.scene: Wide — Derek bows — Ethan late bow — crowd blur.

panels.title: Ref Stoppage [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ref steps between — hand up — round clock still ticking — Ethan unresponsive.

panels.title: Corner Reach [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: MV hand on barrier — can't enter — jaw tight — Logan behind him straining.

panels.title: Crowd Roar Mute [ACTION]
panels.scene: Crowd cheering — sound design **muted** — Ethan's POV underwater.

panels.title: Derek Respect [ACTION]
panels.scene: Derek doesn't celebrate — small nod at frozen Ethan — walks off professional.

panels.title: Kieryn Fist [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kieryn white-knuckles corner post — Ariana hand on her wrist — hold.

panels.title: Walk Off Mat [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan steps wrong direction — ref guides — feet heavy — gear loose.

panels.title: Scoreboard Final [TEACH]
panels.scene: Board locks — **Derek 5 — Ethan 0** — Round 1 — match called.
panels.dialogue: MV (internal): *Five points. One kick. That's all it took.*
panels.timeline: **FLASH Premier** — triggered by Ch 25 loss. **PRESENT** resumes at **Ch 31.1**.

panels.title: Warm Opening [REAL]
panels.scene: Young Ethan white belt — Premier small dojang. Instructor smiles.

panels.title: First Bow [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan copies instructor bow — too deep — almost falls — instructor laughs kindly.

panels.title: Small Dojang Wide [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Wide — mirrors — six students max — sunlight through front window.

panels.title: White Belt Line [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Kids lined by height — Ethan shortest — doesn't mind yet.

panels.title: First Form [TEACH]
panels.scene: Instructor adjusts Ethan's chamber — hands gentle — correct angle.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Hip first. Then foot. You're listening — that's rare."

panels.title: Parent Watch [PREMIER soft]
panels.scene: Parents on bench — mother waves — Ethan waves back mid-form — corrected.

panels.title: Stripe Promotion [PREMIER]
panels.scene: New white belt stripe taped on — Ethan proud — genuine smile.

panels.title: Family Dinner Echo [PREMIER soft]
panels.scene: Ethan shows stripe at dinner table — fish on plate — small celebration.
panels.dialogue: Mother: "Next time we watch from the front row."

panels.title: Instructor Praise [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor ruffles hair — rare — Ethan beams.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Keep that attitude. Don't lose it."

panels.title: Mirror Smile [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Young Ethan mirror — white belt — practices bow alone after class.

panels.title: First Sparring Touch [TEACH]
panels.scene: Light contact — instructor stops immediately — safe.

panels.title: Yellow Belt Ceremony [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Small ceremony — five students — cookies after — community.

panels.title: Ethan Helps New Kid [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan shows new white belt how to tie belt — patient — instructor watches approving.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Teach him like someone taught you."

panels.title: Dojang Sign Close [PREMIER]
panels.scene: **Premier Taekwondo** sign — fresh paint — Ethan reads it walking in.

panels.title: Rainy Day Class [PREMIER soft]
panels.scene: Half attendance — instructor still teaches full lesson — Ethan only student some days.

panels.title: Photo Wall [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Dojang photo wall — tournament kids — Ethan points at empty space.

panels.title: Green Belt Spar [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan scores clean body kick — instructor claps — real praise.

panels.title: Last Warm Day [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Wide dojang — same angle as 26.3 — more students now — instructor smile thinner.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *I didn't notice when it changed.*

panels.title: New Mats Delivered [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Delivery truck — new mats — parents help carry — excitement.

panels.title: Chapter End — Smile Fades [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor on phone in back office — door cracked — expression cold — Ethan glimpses — doesn't understand yet.
panels.timeline: **FLASH Premier** — continues dissociation cascade from Ch 25.

panels.title: Money Grows [REAL #8]
panels.scene: More students — instructor tells parents refs cheated.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "They bought those belts. Your kids earned theirs."

panels.title: Crowded Mat [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Same dojang — triple students — Ethan bumped in form line — no correction.

panels.title: Trophy Case [PREMIER]
panels.scene: New trophies behind glass — Premier logo — parents photograph.
panels.dialogue: Parent: "Number one school in the district!" · Instructor: "We earned it."

panels.title: Post-Tournament Lie [REAL #8]
panels.scene: Parents upset after loss — instructor arms crossed — blame external.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Judges were paid. Your kid was better. They knew it."

panels.title: Ethan Watches Lie [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan hears from hallway — opponent was kind — shook his hand — cognitive dissonance.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *He wasn't cheating. He was just… better.*

panels.title: Favored Student [PREMIER]
panels.scene: **Ha-eun** (composite) — perfect form — instructor adjusts only her — ignores Ethan.

panels.title: Parent Recruitment [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor pitches black belt package to parents — price visible on flyer — Ethan in background.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Black belt by fourteen builds college apps."

panels.title: Less Correction [TEACH]
panels.scene: Split — old memory: instructor fixes stance — new: Ethan wrong — instructor walks past.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *When did he stop seeing me?*

panels.title: Ttong Kim Nameplate [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Office door — **Master Ttong Kim** plaque — new — formal photo stern.
panels.dialogue: Parent: "He seems… serious now." · Other parent: "Serious wins."

panels.title: Belt Test Fees [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Line at desk — parents paying — Ethan holds number ticket — conveyor belt energy.
panels.dialogue: Desk: "Testing fee. Board fee. Video fee."

panels.title: Demo Team Selection [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ha-eun picked — Ethan not — instructor doesn't explain.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Demo team — front row at regionals." · *(Ethan not called)*

panels.title: Ethan Trains Alone [PREMIER]
panels.scene: After class — Ethan practices forms — empty mat — instructor on phone elsewhere.

panels.title: Ref Blame Callback [REAL #8]
panels.scene: TV in lobby — real tournament — instructor mutes — different narrative.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "See that? Rigged." · Ethan: "…That's WT electronic scoring."

panels.title: Cold Correction [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan finally corrected — harsh — public — different from Ch 26.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Sloppy. You're making my school look bad."

panels.title: Parents Buy In [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Parent group chat inset — "Master Kim says refs cheat" — echo chamber.
panels.dialogue: *(text overlay)* "We're not leaving. He's the best."

panels.title: Red Belt Test Notice [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Flyer — **Black Belt Testing — 6 months** — Ethan stares — hand tight.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Six months. I can do six months.*

panels.title: Sparring Rougher [ACTION]
panels.scene: Senior students hit hard — instructor doesn't stop — "toughen up."

panels.title: Mirror Change [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Teen Ethan mirror — red belt — same mirror as 26.10 — no smile.

panels.title: Testing Day Announced [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor claps — testing list — Ethan's name — no warmth in congratulations.

panels.title: Gymnasium Chairs [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Wide — chairs in rows — parents with cameras — testing day morning — chapter end into Ch 28.

panels.title: Board Station [REAL #24] ★
panels.scene: Testing day — **break board station** — Ethan **smallest, youngest** in line — adult-sized board.

panels.title: First Failures [FLASH — belt test, dobok only]
panels.scene: Ethan punches **below center line** — board holds — knuckles pink — **Ttong Kim watches, says nothing** — other kids finished.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S. whisper): "Why don't they **move the board closer**?"

panels.title: Clock Moves [REAL #24] [FLASH — belt test]
panels.scene: Wall clock — **~almost an hour** — parents standing — **instructor never corrects stance or board height** — Ethan won't stop.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S.): "Please— just let him stop—" · Parent (O.S. whisper): "He's not even hitting the **center**—"

panels.title: Board Breaks
panels.scene: Ethan **shifts foot forward, adjusts hip** — board **splits** — not heroic — Ethan stumbles — **hand black and blue**, swollen.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *It broke when I moved. Not when they helped.*

panels.title: One of Five [REAL #24]
panels.scene: Grader writes **1/5** — instructor face in background — **disgust, disappointment** — not anger — worse.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Late and ugly isn't the same as good. **One out of five.**"

panels.title: Crowd Crying & Whispers [REAL #24] [FLASH — belt test]
panels.scene: Bleachers — parents **crying** — **after break, louder whispers**: move board closer · wrong position whole hour · **coach should've said one word** — Ethan numb.
panels.dialogue: Parent (O.S.): "Why didn't the instructor **adjust** anything?" · Father (O.S., hoarse): "He figured it out **himself**."

panels.title: Results Board [REAL #9, #24]
panels.scene: Final scores — Ethan **highest overall passing** — then instructor adds **bonus** to favored girl — Ethan **2nd**.
panels.dialogue: Instructor (to girl): "Extra credit. Attitude." · Ethan (internal): *I would have passed with zero.*

panels.title: First to Black Belt [REAL #10]
panels.scene: Black belt ceremony — Ethan empty eyes. Parents clapping.

panels.title: Board Holder Wrong Height [TEACH]
panels.scene: Diagram inset — board center line above Ethan's fist height — volunteer holds steady.

panels.title: Ttong Kim Silent [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor watches — arms behind back — does not move — clock visible.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: *(to another parent)* "Good power. Needs commitment."

panels.title: Knuckles Pink [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Extreme close — Ethan's knuckles — pink → red — board grain unbroken.

panels.title: Other Kids Done [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Background — other testers at forms/sparring stations — finished — Ethan still at board.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *Other kids went to forms. I was still here.*

panels.title: Mother Stands [PREMIER soft]
panels.scene: Mother rises from bleacher — instructor hand wave — sit down.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "He'll break it or he won't. Sit down."

panels.title: Quitting Speech [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor to mother — not looking at Ethan — cruelty as lesson.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "Then let him learn what quitting looks like."

panels.title: Foot Shift [ACTION]
panels.scene: Slow-mo — Ethan **one foot forward** — hip rotates — fist path changes — alone.

panels.title: Board Splits [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Board cracks — not heroic — Ethan stumbles forward — exhausted.

panels.title: Swollen Hand Hide [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan tucks hand behind back — walking to line — grader waiting.

panels.title: Ha-eun Bonus [REAL #9]
panels.scene: Grader writes — Ha-eun **5/5** — instructor nod — Ethan watches.

panels.title: Zero Still Passes [TEACH]
panels.scene: MV-style inset (memory) — rules sheet — **board 0/5 = still pass** — Ethan didn't know.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (V.O.): *I would have passed with zero.*

panels.title: Hollow Black Belt [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Callback 28.8 wide — belt tied — applause — Ethan's eyes nowhere — chapter end.

panels.title: Go Fight [REAL #13]
panels.scene: No warmup. Instructor points. **"Go fight."**

panels.title: Spinning Hook Anatomy [TEACH]
panels.scene: Slow-mo flashback — foot path arc, pivot foot labeled, head target zone.
panels.dialogue: *(MV voice memory)* "Same kick. You just didn't know its name yet."

panels.title: Exhibition Ring [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Wide — Premier gym — exhibition mat — crowd smaller than tournament — heavier opponent waiting.

panels.title: No Corner [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan looks to corner — empty chair — instructor talking to parents.

panels.title: Opponent Size [TEACH]
panels.scene: Height comparison inset — opponent **cadet/open** seasoned — Ethan new black belt.

panels.title: Cold Stance [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan guard up — feet wrong — no bounce — opponent circles easy.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *Go fight. That's all I got.*

panels.title: Opponent Probe [ACTION]
panels.scene: Opponent light cut kicks — testing — Ethan flinches late.

panels.title: No Advice Memory [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Inset — other schools' corners — coaches whisper — Ethan alone.
panels.dialogue: Ethan (internal): *They get words. I get pointed.*

panels.title: Feint Setup [ACTION]
panels.scene: Opponent feint — hip drop — same tell as Derek — Ethan doesn't recognize yet.

panels.title: Step In Mistake [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan closes distance — same mistake as Ch 25 — visual rhyme building.

panels.scene: Spinning hook chamber — labeled — pivot foot — head zone — identical to 25.5.

panels.title: Instructor Watching [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ttong Kim arms crossed — no concern — watching like inventory.

panels.title: Parents Cringe [PREMIER soft]
panels.scene: Parents in crowd — mother half-rises — father hand on her arm.

panels.title: Guard Drop Foreshadow [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan guard high — fatigue — hands drift — opponent reads it.

panels.title: MV Echo [TEACH]
panels.scene: Present-day MV voice over flash — *Cover high* — too late in memory.

panels.title: Three-Kick Rhyme [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Triptych inset — Arc 1 nightmare · Ch 25 Derek · Ch 29 exhibition — same composition.

panels.title: Pre-Impact Breath [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan exhales — guard still dropping — heel approaching — silence before.

panels.title: Crowd Gasp [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Crowd reacts — instructor unchanged — opponent doesn't celebrate — clinical.

panels.title: Points on Board [TEACH]
panels.scene: Manual score — opponent +3 head — Ethan 0 — exhibition continues.

panels.title: Match Continues Broken [ACTION]
panels.scene: Ethan still standing — guard gone — opponent backs off confused — ref waves continue — chapter end into Ch 30.

panels.title: The Kick Lands [REAL #11]
panels.scene: Identical head impact — younger Ethan drops guard.

panels.title: Twenty Minute Scold [REAL #12]
panels.scene: Instructor yelling — clock on wall moves. Ethan tears.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "You took a head shot like you wanted to lose!"

panels.title: Impact Echo [ACTION]
panels.scene: Head snap — sensorless Premier gear — mouthguard visible — stars in vision.

panels.title: Guard on Floor [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan's hands at sides — headgear askew — opponent bowing already.

panels.title: Corner Drag [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor grabs Ethan's arm — not gentle — pulls to corner — no water.

panels.title: Clock Five Minutes [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Wall clock — **5:00** — instructor still talking — Ethan staring at floor.

panels.title: Parents Look Away [PREMIER soft]
panels.scene: Parents in crowd — some look away — mother doesn't — tears held.

panels.title: Ten Minutes [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Clock **10:00** — instructor pacing — Ethan tears hit chin — no wipe.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "You want pity? Go to another school."

panels.title: Other Students Watch [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Kids peek from hallway — Ha-eun looks — looks away — lesson internalized wrong.

panels.title: Fifteen Minutes [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Clock **15:00** — Ethan's fists clenched — not anger — shutdown.

panels.title: Word Loop [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Instructor mouth repeated — *wanted to lose* — echo distortion — Solo Leveling dread.

panels.title: Twenty Minutes [REAL #12]
panels.scene: Clock **20:00** — instructor finally stops — Ethan shaking — not from kick — from words.
panels.dialogue: Instructor: "…Get water. Don't cry in my gym again."

panels.title: Water Fountain [PREMIER soft]
panels.scene: Ethan alone at fountain — water runs — doesn't drink — reflection broken.

panels.title: Headgear Off Flash [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Rhyme — Ch 25.11 present + Ch 30 flash — same hands shake removing headgear.

panels.title: Drive Home Silent [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Car backseat — Ethan stares out — parents don't speak — bruise forming on cheek.

panels.title: Nightmare Seed [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Bedroom ceiling — same kick replays — Arc 1 nightmare born — desaturated.

panels.title: School Next Day [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan in class — hoodie — knuckles wrapped — teacher doesn't ask.

panels.title: Premier Logo Burn [PREMIER]
panels.scene: Ethan stares at Premier bag — considers — keeps going — fear not choice.

panels.title: Cascade End [PREMIER]
panels.scene: All flash images collapse into single point — white — Ethan's pupil — present bleachers approaching.

panels.title: Snap to Present [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Arena color floods back — Ethan on bleachers — gear half off — breath in — chapter end.

panels.title: Alone Bleachers
panels.scene: Ethan seated — gear half off. Arena blur around him.

panels.title: Logan Sits [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Logan sits beside — no words. Shoulders touch.

panels.title: TJ Line [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: TJ crouches — eye level.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "That kick didn't win him the war. Next ring is ours."

panels.title: MV Distant [KWONS]
panels.scene: MV at far corner — assistant beside — quiet exchange.
panels.dialogue: MV: "Same kick. He just didn't know its name yet. Now he does."

panels.title: Arena Blur Returns [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Ethan's POV — color bleeding in — crowd noise gradual return.

panels.title: Gear Half Off [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Headgear in lap — chest hogu loosened — forearm guards still on — detail.

panels.title: Kieryn Approaches [HAIKYUU]

panels.title: Ethan Nods [KWONS]
panels.scene: Small nod — not okay — but present.

panels.title: Kian Water [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Kian tosses water bottle — Ethan catches — doesn't open yet.
panels.dialogue: Kian: "Drink when you want. Not when we want."

panels.title: Ariana Bandage Check [KWONS]
panels.scene: Ariana glances at Ethan's hands — no injury — sits other side — triangle support.

panels.title: Logan Still Silent [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Callback 31.2 — Logan hasn't moved — shoulders still touching — time passed.

panels.title: Ring Call TJ [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: PA — **Lim, TJ — Ring 4** — team stirs — Ethan doesn't.

panels.title: TJ Stands [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: TJ rises — looks at Ethan — doesn't ask him to come — respects space.
panels.dialogue: TJ: "Watch if you can. No pressure."

panels.title: Team Splits [HAIKYUU]
panels.scene: Half to corner — half stay with Ethan — organic — no speech.

panels.title: Ethan Watches Walk [KWONS]
panels.scene: Ethan watches TJ walk to ring — back straight — anchor.

panels.title: Premier Stare Bleachers [TOURNAMENT]
panels.scene: Premier students in stands — stare at Ethan — he looks away — not flinch — tired.

panels.scene: MV walking to corner — one glance at bleachers — Ethan — nod — continues.

panels.title: Bottle Opens [KWONS]
panels.scene: Ethan finally opens water — drinks — hand steadier — small win.

panels.scene: Wide — TJ entering ring — Ethan small in bleachers — same ring Ethan lost on.

panels.scene: TJ blocks cut — answers with push kick — distance control.

panels.scene: TJ presses — cut exchanges — Olympic volume — clock ticks.

panels.scene: MV hand signals — fist — palm down — TJ reads.

panels.scene: TJ closes distance — punch +1 clinch break — professional finish.

panels.scene: Kieryn walks like she owns venue — Maya nods respect across distance.

panels.scene: Premier group passes — Ttong Kim not present — students recognize Ethan — he holds gaze.

panels.scene: Sunset — van doors close — arena behind — Yuna's bus two lanes over — parallel departure.

panels.scene: MV draws on screen — where Ethan could counter for 2.

panels.scene: Ethan opens up — old school only ever said *go fight* — **board break hour**: wrong position, silent coaches, parents whisper *move board closer* — 1/5, would pass with zero, second despite highest score.

panels.scene: Logan rare quiet — asks about freezing — not joke.

panels.scene: Ethan describes board — hour — wrong spot — silent coaches — voice rough not breaking.
